channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Black Audi parked on the road outside 13 Cedar Road, 2nd March
item.description:
The car has no number plates front or back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cedar Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter and poor condition of Plumstead underpass, 2nd March
item.description:
I would like to report the poor condition of the recently refurbished Plumstead underpass (see attached photo). Despite being newly updated, it is already heavily littered and looks neglected. This makes the area unpleasant and unwelcoming for pedestrians and families using this route. Please could this underpass be cleaned and maintained properly.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Mill Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged footpath - difficult for buggies, 2nd March
item.description:
I would like to report the poor condition of the footpath in the park (see attached photo). The surface is uneven and damaged, making it uncomfortable and difficult to use with a buggy or pushchair. It is also a potential trip hazard for other pedestrians. Please could this path be inspected and repaired.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Mill Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of litter left on street, 2nd March
item.description:
A pile of litter was left outside 44/44A Geldeston Road. It was left while we had scaffolding up but was not left by our builders. Someone obviously saw this as an opportune moment and left it outside. Council claim to have sorted it on 2 march. Still here

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Geldeston Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling not picked up, 2nd March
item.description:
Recycling bin not collected last Friday.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sladedale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This road has become health hazard, 2nd March
item.description:
This has become the most disgusting road in plumstead. Not only do we have people dumping cars and massive loads of fly tipping along with rats, filth and antisocial behaviour because of 24 hour shop, we now have human and dog faeces lining up the road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Rippolson Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signal head facing wrong direction, 2nd March
item.description:
Needs turning round

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 288, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Damage - pole leaning / equipment detached from pole/facing the wrong direction

item.title: 10 inch pothole, 2nd March
item.description:
Pothole so deep it is damaging vehicles
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Balfour Rd, London N5 2DU, 2nd March
item.description:
The road is full off pot holes and makes it impossible to ride a bike on the road without nearly coming off it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balfour Road, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish litter never cleared, 2nd March
item.description:
Large amount of rubbish and litter on land around underpass along Pettiman Cresent and Tom Cribb Road. Please take a look before marking this as 'Fixed'. It is there for over 3 months - horrible.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Cribb Road, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Untaxed & expired MOT, 2nd March
item.description:
This vehicle keeps parking here like it’s being hidden. This vehicle never been seen parked here until it started turning up in last 4 weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lesney Park Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Goswell Road in front of Crescent House, 2nd March
item.description:
The road is in desperate need of resurfacing. It is unsafe for cyclists. It is likely damaging cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Goswell Road, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped furniture, 2nd March
item.description:
A chest of drawers has been left on the grass verge opposite the nursery.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Langdon Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The road surface is unsafe for cyclists, 2nd March
item.description:
Goswell Road has been allowed to deteriorate. It is unsafe for cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Goswell Road, City of London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree ornaments are very nice, 2nd March
item.description:
But how about removing them? It’s not Christmas anymore =)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3-4, London Bridge Walk, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street Light out, 2nd March
item.description:
Outside 97 Green Lane street light out 09V 0630

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham

18V 0630 light is out by 73 Green Lane

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lane, Eltham

item.title: Smashed glass near primary school, 2nd March
item.description:
Smashed glass, clean it up

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Culford Mews, Hackney, London
